summary: P0 batch testing completed successfully. All 7 test areas passed: ScrollToTop works on navigation, Polish translations display correctly on Weekly Activities and Committee pages, News 'Read More' modal opens with full article content, Events page renders without errors, Associated Groups display 'Visit Website' buttons, and language toggle works without broken translation keys.
passed_tests: ScrollToTop: Pages scroll to top on navigation (Events, Weekly, Committee all start at scrollY=0)
Polish translations - Weekly Activities: Title 'Zajęcia Tygodniowe', Subtitle 'Regularne programy i zajęcia w Polskim Domu Kultury', Footer 'Dołącz do Naszych Zajęć'
Polish translations - Committee: Title 'Nasz Zarząd', Subtitle with 'Poznaj oddany zespół...', Volunteer section 'Zainteresowany Wolontariatem?', Membership section 'Chcesz zostać Członkiem?'
News 'Read More' modal: Modal opens on click, displays full article content (title, image, date, body text), close button works
Events page: Renders without errors, displays 9 events with proper cards (date, time, location, description)
Associated Groups: 5 'Visit Website' buttons displayed for groups with website links
Language toggle: No broken translation keys on /, /events, /weekly, /committee, /groups, /hall-hire, /constitution pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 batch fixes verified: ScrollToTop component at /app/frontend/src/components/ScrollToTop.jsx properly resets scroll on route change. Polish translations for Weekly Activities and Committee pages use t(language, key) function from translations.js. News modal in News.jsx uses selectedArticle state with overlay. Events page at /events displays events from /api/events endpoint. Associated Groups shows Visit Website buttons when group.website exists. Language toggle is the flag icon in navbar - clicking switches between EN/PL.

scroll_to_top.behavior: Uses useLocation hook to detect pathname changes and scrolls to top

news_read_more_modal.content: Full article with title, image, date, body text
news_read_more_modal.close: X button or click outside modal
